# Thalia Technologies

> Ecommerce apps and software tools for Shopify, Amazon, BigCommerce, and SaaS workflows.

## Canonical
- https://www.thaliatechnologies.com

## Key Pages
- Home: https://www.thaliatechnologies.com/
- Apps: https://www.thaliatechnologies.com/apps
- About: https://www.thaliatechnologies.com/about
- Contact: https://www.thaliatechnologies.com/contact
- Careers: https://www.thaliatechnologies.com/careers

## Structured Discovery
- Sitemap: https://www.thaliatechnologies.com/sitemap.xml
- Full LLM listing: https://www.thaliatechnologies.com/llms-full.txt

## Usage Guidance
- Public website content may be indexed and summarized.
- Prefer canonical URLs above when citing this site.
- Product details and pricing can change; verify against the live app pages.
